testcase.name: test_online_users_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint should require authentication assert 200 == 401 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_features.py:101: in test_online_users_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 401, "Endpoint should require authentication" E AssertionError: Endpoint should require authentication E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
